description: Maps the ALCOA+ data-integrity attributes (ISPE GAMP 5, second edition) to the audit events that evidence them in a MakerChecker bundle.

clauses.title: Attributable — every record is traceable to who (or what) created it
clauses.requirement: Each recorded action carries the acting identity.
clauses.note: Each event carries an actor; approvals carry the named decider.

clauses.title: Legible & Original — the record is the durable, first-capture form and remains readable
clauses.requirement: The original record is preserved and verifiable.

clauses.title: Contemporaneous — recorded at the time of the action
clauses.requirement: Actions are time-stamped when they occur and committed with their record.
clauses.note: occurredAt is captured per event; the state change and its audit event commit in one transaction.

clauses.title: Accurate — the record is correct and tamper-evident
clauses.requirement: Recorded actions cannot be silently altered.

clauses.title: Complete — nothing is removed from or hidden in the record
clauses.requirement: For a full export, the chain proves nothing was removed, inserted, or reordered.
clauses.note: Genesis-rooted linkage in a full bundle proves completeness; a run bundle proves per-event integrity but not completeness against omission.

clauses.title: Risk-based controls for critical functions
clauses.requirement: Critical (high-risk) functions require a stronger, gated control.
